assessment.text: Supports clinician-documented reflux management, medication-plan discussion, review, and specialist referral where symptoms do not respond or remain unexplained; no dose or autonomous treatment text is mapped.

source.title: Gastro-oesophageal reflux disease and dyspepsia in adults: investigation and management
source.population: Adults aged 18 years and over with dyspepsia, symptoms suggestive of gastro-oesophageal reflux disease, or both.
source.setting: Community, primary-care, investigation, review, and specialist referral.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected adult reflux and dyspepsia symptom, alarm, investigation, review, and clinician-discussed management fields; the legacy workflow has no adult-only filter and UAE pathways require clinician review.
